positive: A stylized, minimalistic depiction of a cosmic forest. The main subject is a group of glowing, bioluminescent mushrooms and intertwined branches forming natural, abstract patterns. The palette should feature deep midnight blues, vibrant emerald greens, and ethereal magenta accents. The composition must be highly symmetrical and central, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes against a slightly distressed, textured background. Lighting should be dramatic and diffused, simulating moonlight filtering through a nebula haze. Graphic novel style meets ethereal watercolor; suitable for a distressed screen print or apparel graphic. Highly detailed linework, vector-art precision, negative space utilization.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, lowres, poorly drawn, poorly rendered
